channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KIRLFER] Kirloskar Ferrous Board to Consider FY26 Results & Fundraise on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Thursday, May 7, 2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will deliberate on and decide various fund-raising options. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board will also consider fund-raising options.
  • Meeting is in compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRLOSKAR FERROUS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India: Trading Window Closed from Jan 1, 2022
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd. announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons from January 1, 2022, until 48 hours after the announcement of the unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2021. The date of the board meeting to consider and approve the results will be communicated separately.

  • Trading window closed from January 1, 2022.
  • Closure applies to designated persons as per SEBI regulations.
  • Trading restriction lasts until 48 hours post Q3 results announcement.
  • Unaudited financial results are for quarter and nine months ended Dec 31, 2021.
  • Board meeting date for results approval to be announced later.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [CAPILLARY] Capillary Technologies Completes Session M Inc. Acquisition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Capillary Technologies India Ltd. has completed the acquisition of Session M Inc. and its subsidiary Session M Czech Republic s.r.o. on May 1, 2026. This follows the company's initial disclosure on February 24, 2026, regarding the investment in its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Capillary Pte. Ltd., for the acquisition of 100% shareholding in Session M Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Mastercard Inc.

  • Capillary Technologies completes acquisition of Session M Inc.
  • Closing conditions for the acquisition were met on May 1, 2026.
  • Session M Inc. and Session M Czech Republic s.r.o. are now wholly owned subsidiaries of Capillary Technologies.
  • Acquisition details were previously disclosed on February 24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capillary Technologies India Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Board approves Q3 FY22 results with qualified review
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on October 14, 2024, approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2021. The company also submitted a Limited Review Report from Raman S. Shah & Associates, which was a Qualified Limited Review Report. The review was conducted in accordance with the Standard on Review Engagements (SRE) 2410.

  • Board approved Q3 FY22 unaudited financial results on October 14, 2024.
  • Results include a Limited Review Report by Raman S. Shah & Associates.
  • Auditor issued a Qualified Limited Review Report for the financial results.
  • Review was conducted according to Standard on Review Engagements (SRE) 2410.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Board Approves Q1 FY21 Unaudited Results
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd's Board of Directors, at a meeting held on September 21, 2024, approved the Unaudited Standalone Financial Results for the quarter ended June 30, 2020. The company submitted these results along with a Limited Review Report from Raman S. Shah & Associates, Chartered Accountants. The auditor's report is a Qualified Limited Review Report, indicating certain matters described in paragraph 4 (Basis for Qualified Limited Review Report) that prevent a clean opinion on the financial statements.

  • Board approved Q1 FY21 unaudited standalone financial results.
  • Results pertain to the quarter ended June 30, 2020.
  • Meeting held on September 21, 2024, to approve results.
  • Auditors issued a Qualified Limited Review Report.
  • The report highlights possible effects of certain matters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Approves Audited Standalone Results for June 2021
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results with the Limited Review Report for the quarter ended June 30, 2021, in a meeting held on October 4, 2024. The meeting commenced at 11:30 a.m. and concluded at 1:00 p.m. The approved financial results and reports have been enclosed with the filing.

  • Nutraplus India approved audited standalone financial results for Q1 2021.
  • The Board of Directors meeting was held on October 4, 2024.
  • Limited Review Report for the quarter ended June 30, 2021, was approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Approves Unaudited Results for Dec 31, 2020
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Unaudited Standalone Financial Results with the Limited Review Report for the quarter ended December 31, 2020, in a meeting held on September 28, 2024. The meeting commenced at 4:00 p.m. and concluded at 5:30 p.m. The results were reviewed by Raman S. Shah & Associates, Chartered Accountants, who issued a qualified limited review report.

  • Nutraplus India's board approved unaudited standalone financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter ended December 31, 2020.
  • Board meeting was held on September 28, 2024.
  • Auditor issued a qualified limited review report.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Approves June 2022 Quarter Results
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Quarterly Financial Results with the Limited Review Report for the quarter ended June 30, 2022, in a meeting held on October 16, 2024. The meeting commenced at 3.30 p.m. and concluded at 6.30 p.m. The results were reviewed by Raman S. Shah & Associates, Chartered Accountants, who issued a qualified limited review report.

  • Nutraplus India approved Q1 FY23 financial results in board meeting.
  • Raman S. Shah & Associates issued a qualified limited review report.
  • The board meeting was held on October 16, 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India reports Q3 FY24 net loss of ₹2.71 Cr
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Nutraplus India Limited, at its meeting on November 22, 2024, approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2023. The company reported a net loss of ₹2.71 crore for the quarter, with basic and diluted EPS at ₹(0.01). Total income from operations was ₹0.10 crore, while total expenditure stood at ₹2.71 crore. The company noted that the delay in submission was due to operational disruptions from the COVID-19 pandemic and the subsequent auctioning of its property, plants, and equipment under the SARFAESI Act, 2002. The company operates in a single segment: Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API).

  • Board approved unaudited Q3 FY24 financial results on November 22, 2024.
  • Company reported a net loss of ₹2.71 crore for the quarter ended December 31, 2023.
  • Basic and diluted EPS stood at ₹(0.01) for the quarter.
  • Delay in results attributed to COVID-19 and asset auctioning under SARFAESI Act.
  • Operations are solely in the Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API) segment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [EPACKPEB] Epack Prefab Revises Plant Address; Capacity Addition Update
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd. has revised its intimation regarding the commencement of commercial production at its Mambattu Phase II plant in Andhra Pradesh due to a typographical error in the plant address. The correct address is now reflected as "Plot No. 5 & 6, Mambattu Phase II, Industrial Park, APIIC Tada, Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh – 524401". The company also notes that the development can be considered a capacity addition, with expansion activities aligned with the IPO prospectus. Existing capacity is 68,112 MT with 60% utilization, and a proposed addition of 13,200 MT has been undertaken, financed by IPO proceeds.

  • Epack Prefab corrects plant address in commercial production intimation.
  • Plant expansion considered capacity addition, aligned with IPO prospectus.
  • Existing capacity: 68,112 MT with 60% utilization.
  • Capacity addition of 13,200 MT undertaken, financed by IPO proceeds.
  • Company to update stock exchanges upon completion of expansion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update
